Help & how this works
Missed trash pickup on Elm St
Helping you: Maria Alvarez
Public Works
 Typical reply in about 3 minutes
Print this chat
You are now chatting with Maria from Public Works

Maria handles trash, recycling, and street cleanup. Take your time — there is no rush. Anything you type here is private between you and city staff.

Hi there! I’m Maria with Riverbend Public Works. I see you wanted to ask about a trash pickup that was missed. Can you tell me your street address, and which day pickup was supposed to happen?

Maria · 10:14 AM

Hi Maria. My address is 412 Elm Street, apartment 2B. The truck was supposed to come Tuesday morning but our bins are still full at the curb.

You · 10:15 AM

Thank you, I have that. Just to double-check — is it the green trash bin, the blue recycling bin, or both that were not picked up?

Maria · 10:16 AM

Both bins are still full. The green one mostly.

You · 10:17 AM

Got it. I’ve checked our route log for Tuesday on the east side of Elm Street — the truck had a mechanical issue and skipped your block. I’m sorry about that. I’m scheduling a make-up pickup for tomorrow (Thursday) between 7 AM and 11 AM. Please leave your bins at the curb tonight.

Maria · 10:19 AM
YOUR REFERENCE NUMBER
PW-2024-08431

Save this number. You can mention it any time you contact us about this pickup.

Oh great, thank you so much. Do I need to do anything else, or just leave the bins out?

You · 10:21 AM

Just leave them at the curb by 6:30 AM with the lids closed. No need to call back. If the truck still misses you tomorrow (it shouldn’t!), reply right here in this chat with your reference number and I’ll personally follow up. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

Maria · 10:22 AM
Yes, that helps
Can you explain more?
I have a follow-up
Send
Add a photo of the issue — tap the paperclip to attach a picture from your phone or computer.
